documents: Paris has many museums and famous cafes.
Paris is known for art galleries and quiet streets.
The Eiffel Tower attracts visitors every year.
Travelers enjoy walking along the Seine at sunset.
French bakeries in Paris serve warm bread each morning.
Tourists take photos near historic bridges in Paris.
Tokyo is full of bright signs and busy stations.
Tokyo trains arrive on time almost every day.
Many people in Tokyo enjoy ramen late at night.
Shibuya crossing stays crowded during evening rush hour.
Small Tokyo shops sell snacks and useful gadgets.
City parks in Tokyo offer calm places to rest.
Mount Everest stands above surrounding peaks in Asia.
Climbers train for months before trying Everest routes.
Snow and thin air make Everest climbs dangerous.
Base camps near Everest become busy in spring.
Guides check weather reports before summit attempts.
Mountain teams carry oxygen bottles for high altitude.
Coffee tastes better when beans are freshly ground.
Morning coffee can help people focus on work.
Some cafes roast beans in small batches.
A good grinder improves the flavor of espresso.
Cold brew coffee is smooth and less acidic.
Many workers start meetings after a cup of coffee.
Solar panels convert sunlight into electrical energy.
Wind turbines generate power on open plains.
Batteries store renewable energy for night use.
Engineers improve grid systems to reduce waste.
Electric cars need reliable charging infrastructure.
Cities invest in clean energy to cut pollution.
Basketball players practice shooting from different angles.
Team defense often decides close basketball games.
Coaches review game footage to improve strategy.
A fast pass can break a full court press.
Strong rebounding creates extra scoring chances.
Fans celebrate loudly after a final second basket.
A violin can produce warm and expressive tones.
Piano practice builds coordination and timing skills.
Many songs use simple chords and repeating rhythms.
Live concerts create a strong connection with audiences.
Singers protect their voices with careful breathing.
Music teachers recommend steady daily practice.
Rain forests contain many rare plants and insects.
Wetlands help filter water and reduce flood risk.
Ocean currents move heat across large distances.
Coral reefs support diverse marine ecosystems.
Drought can damage crops and raise food prices.
Climate models estimate long term weather patterns.
Recycling programs reduce landfill waste in cities.
Tree planting projects improve air quality in neighborhoods.
